## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed
- user-facing or reviewer-facing impact

## Collection-Grade Impact

- [ ] improves evidence quality or explainability
- [ ] improves self-hosted/free-path usability
- [ ] improves ecosystem docs or public readiness
- [ ] improves test, benchmark, or release confidence

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] `python benchmarks/run_benchmark.py --json`
- [ ] `python -m build`
- [ ] `twine check dist/*`

## Surface Checks

- [ ] README or docs updated when public behavior changed
- [ ] skill / Gemini / MCP surfaces updated when applicable
- [ ] release notes or changelog updated

## Risks

- mention any remaining limitations, rollout concerns, or follow-up work
